should_trigger.prompt: Reconcile these bank statements to the accounting journal and produce unmatched bank and journal rows.
Usa la riconciliazione giornale-banca sugli estratti conto e sul mastrino banca.
Match ledger rows to bank movements with amount/date tolerance and explain exceptions.

should_not_trigger.prompt: Extract this journal and select a sample of 25 entries.
Compare these sampled entries to their invoice PDFs.
Build a financial report from these trial balance files.
